name: Revolution: Success
description:
"The people have nothing to lose but their chains. They have a new order to win."

Out with the old, and in with the new - the revolution was a success.

The only option left? Reshape the nation of Lotheria into something history will remember, with your own ideology and principles as the forefront.

Your followers are loyal to you or the new party you represent, while many stand in your way to oppose everything you represent.

Control Lotheria's industries, pass laws, consolidate power, purge dissent, live as a gilded autocrat or a humble elected president - the fate of an entire country rests in your hands.
creator: breadstact4
